heading: Rules and regulations
label: 1861 Rules and regulations
text: The Secretary may issue such rules and regulations as are necessary to carry out this chapter, consistent with the requirements of chapter 5 of title 5.
notes: Effective DateSection effective 90 days from , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 14, 1983section 524 of Pub. L. 97–470section 1801 of this title
